title: artemisia argyi var. incana
intro: Artemisia argyi var. incana is a type of plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Artemisia argyi var. incana include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, cough, and asthma, as well as its antipyretic properties to reduce fever. Artemisia argyi var. incana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a dried flower or in the form of pills or capsules.
